codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the reported build break: BackfillCursorStore.swift existed on disk but was not included in OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj. The commit adds the missing PBXFileReference/PBXBuildFile entries, wires the file into the DataStore group, and includes it in PBXSourcesBuildPhase. This is the minimal, correct change needed to restore type resolution for DataStore and unblock app+test target compilation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned skill (indexing-efficiency-worker) is mismatched for this class of fix. Its required procedure emphasizes TDD and retrieval/indexing invariant validation, while this feature was a project-file wiring repair. The worker still marked followedProcedure=true despite not performing that procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature is a build-break fix in project.pbxproj (commit 307655e2eabe71b13c1b382a810949fb197c5748) with no indexing logic changes; skill file .factory/skills/indexing-efficiency-worker/SKILL.md requires red/green tests and retrieval/indexing validators that were not run in this session transcript skeleton.

summary: Reviewed feature core-engine-fix-backfillcursorstore-build-break and the associated commit. Implementation is scoped and correct for the failure mode, with no blocking code issues found; review passes. Logged one shared-state observation about skill-procedure mismatch for this type of project configuration fix.
